title: pennellia patens
intro: Pennellia patens, also known as Mexican tea or Mexican mint, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pennellia patens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
